mechanism: Inhibits FLT3-ITD and other kinases to block AML cell proliferation

mechanism: Potent inhibition of FLT3-ITD and other TKs leading to growth inhibition in AML lines
additional_notes: Active in FLT3-ITD AML models; consult references for exact assay concentrations

mechanism: Inhibits FLT3 signaling and reduces proliferation in FLT3-activated AML cells
additional_notes: Evidence in FLT3-driven AML lines; specific concentration ranges not provided in text

mechanism: Targets SRC/ABL family kinases with off-target FLT3 inhibition affecting AML subsets
additional_notes: Activity reported in subsets including FLT3-ITD models

mechanism: Inhibits STAT5 signaling leading to viability loss in FLT3-ITD AML cells
additional_notes: Tested in MOLM/MV4-11-style FLT3-ITD AML contexts

mechanism: Mitochondrial translation inhibitor impairing leukemia cell metabolism
additional_notes: Selective effects on leukemia cells including stem cells; AML lines sensitive

mechanism: Iron chelation and inhibition of eIF5A hypusination leading to antileukemic effects
additional_notes: Broad in vitro and in vivo antileukemic activity

mechanism: Inhibits thioredoxin reductase causing oxidative stress–mediated apoptosis
additional_notes: Active in AML cell lines and primary blasts

mechanism: ALDH and NPL4 pathway inhibition (enhanced with copper) causing cytotoxicity
additional_notes: AML lines sensitive under Cu-supplemented conditions

mechanism: DRD2 antagonism with selective activity against leukemia stem/progenitor cells
additional_notes: Affects AML blasts/lines and LSC populations

mechanism: Blocks HMG‑CoA reductase, inducing apoptosis and sensitizing AML cells
additional_notes: Activity reported across AML lines

mechanism: Histone deacetylase inhibition reduces viability and promotes apoptosis/differentiation
additional_notes: Also known as SAHA; approved for CTCL; synergy with other agents noted in AML models

mechanism: Potent pan-HDAC inhibition yielding strong antileukemic activity
additional_notes: Approved for multiple myeloma; active in FLT3-ITD AML models

mechanism: Blocks nuclear export (XPO1), leading to growth inhibition and apoptosis in AML cells
additional_notes: Also known as KPT-330; approved in MM/DLBCL; activity in FLT3-ITD AML lines

mechanism: Inhibits DHODH to drive AML differentiation and growth arrest
additional_notes: Active metabolite teriflunomide; DHODH validated as AML target

mechanism: Inhibits mitochondrial ETC complex III and OXPHOS to suppress AML proliferation
additional_notes: Activity in AML lines and primary samples

mechanism: Induces ER stress/UPR leading to cytotoxicity; enhances effects of proteasome inhibition

mechanism: Blocks Hedgehog signaling implicated in AML stem/progenitor maintenance
additional_notes: Approved for basal cell carcinoma; suppresses growth in AML models

mechanism: Inhibits MEK in the RAS/MAPK pathway to suppress proliferation; synergy with FLT3 inhibitors
additional_notes: Approved for melanoma; activity in RAS/MAPK-driven AML

mechanism: Inhibits Wnt/STAT3 signaling and acts as a mitochondrial uncoupler to reduce AML cell viability
